features.name: Static → Fillable PDF
features.description: Convert any static PDF to fillable using AI field detection (CommonForms)

details.whatItDoes: Uses computer vision to detect text boxes and checkboxes, creates AcroForm fields

features.name: AI Vision Auto-Fill
features.description: Vision AI reads form labels and maps user data to fields using position matching

details.whatItDoes: Sends PDF image + field positions to Gemini; AI matches visual labels to fields

features.name: Public REST API
features.description: Expose endpoints for developers to integrate PDF filling into their apps

details.whatItDoes: REST API with authentication, rate limiting, usage counters
details.endpoints_note: This repo exposes /api/v1/* (profiles, batch, templates, extract, jobs) — differs from early matrix stub paths (/api/convert, …); treat matrix as conceptual.

features.name: Saved User Profiles
features.description: Save personal/business data once, auto-fill any form instantly

details.security: AES-256 envelope in this codebase; tier limits enforced

features.name: Form Template Library
features.description: Pre-built library of common forms ready to fill
features.recommendation: DONE — server-side manifests + APIs (starts with curated medical PAs)

details.repository_note: Matrix lists broad tax catalogs; shipped library starts with pharma PA templates—expand categories over time.

features.name: User Dashboard
features.description: Web interface to manage documents, profiles, and account
features.recommendation: DONE ✅ — /ui/* pages: index, sign, profiles, templates, jobs, batch, keys, multisign, pdftools, extract

details.sections: Dashboard with tier banner, stats tiles, quick actions, recent feeds; full CRUD UI for all features

features.name: Bulk Fill (CSV/Excel)
features.description: Upload spreadsheet → fill hundreds of PDFs with different data

features.name: Smart Data Extraction
features.description: Extract data FROM filled PDFs into structured JSON/CSV
features.recommendation: DONE — AcroForm extract sync + extract_pdf async job

details.note: Vision ‘read handwritten PDF’ backlog differs from shipped AcroForm pipeline

features.name: Workflow Automation
features.description: If-then rules when form filled → email / CRM / branch logic
features.recommendation: PARTIAL NOW — outbound webhooks on job completion only

details.defer: Rule builder + multi-event engine per matrix

features.name: Scheduled Processing
features.description: Schedule bulk jobs to run at specific times

features.name: E-Signature
features.description: Visual signature overlay with ESIGN/UETA legal compliance
features.recommendation: DONE ✅ — draw/type, SHA-256 hash, PDF certificate, consent enforcement

features.name: Multi-Party Signing
features.description: Sequential multi-signer workflow with email notifications
features.recommendation: DONE ✅ — ordered sessions, per-step certs, email notify, final PDF download

features.name: Audit Trail & Certificates
features.description: SHA-256 tamper hash, append-only JSONL log, PDF Certificate of Electronic Signature
features.recommendation: DONE ✅ — every sign event gets audit_id, hash, certificate PDF

features.name: Signature Field Templates
features.description: Named signature zones stored in template manifests

features.name: Remote Online Notarization
features.description: Connect with notary services for documents requiring notarization

features.name: AI Form Builder
features.description: Describe form in plain English → AI creates fillable PDF

features.name: Handwriting Recognition (OCR)
features.description: Scan hand-filled forms and digitize the data

features.name: Enhanced Field Detection
features.description: Improve detection for tables, radios, grouped checkboxes

features.name: AI Data Validation
features.description: AI validates completeness / consistency post-fill

features.name: Chat with Document
features.description: Ask questions about PDF content using AI

features.name: Webhook Integrations
features.description: Send data to external systems via HTTP notifications
features.recommendation: DONE — async completion webhooks + HMAC + retries + manual replay

features.name: No-code automation (Zapier & peers)
features.description: API-first access to batch/template autofill, profiles, extract, and jobs; Zapier/Make/n8n consume the same REST surface + outbound completion webhooks.
features.recommendation: PARTIAL — full integration via REST + OpenAPI today; Zapier Catch Hook works for job completion; optional published Zapier app later for UX shortcuts.

now: REST: batch & template fills, profiles, extract, visual signature — X-API-Key
POST job completion payloads to any HTTPS URL (e.g. Zapier Catch Hook)
Private Zapier Platform CLI bundle at integrations/zapier (npm run validate / zapier push)

features.name: Google Drive Integration
features.description: Save filled PDFs directly to Google Drive

features.name: Dropbox Integration
features.description: Save filled PDFs to Dropbox

features.name: Salesforce Integration
features.description: Generate documents from Salesforce records

features.name: HubSpot Integration
features.description: Generate documents from HubSpot CRM

features.name: Slack Notifications
features.description: Send notifications to Slack channels

features.name: Team Workspaces
features.description: Shared workspace with roles and permissions

features.name: SSO / SAML
features.description: Enterprise SSO providers

features.name: SOC 2 Certification
features.description: Third-party SOC 2 attestation path

features.name: HIPAA Compliance
features.description: Healthcare PHI safeguards + BAAs

features.name: Approval Workflows
features.description: Internal approval gates before finalize/sign

features.name: Custom Branding
features.description: Logo/colors white-label surfaces

features.name: Browser Extension
features.description: Chrome extension enhancements — fill PDFs in-browser
features.recommendation: Cowork lane — complements API + PDF-driven JSX prototype

features.name: Mobile App (iOS/Android)
features.description: Native mobile flows for fill/sign

features.name: Desktop App
features.description: Native Windows/Mac client

features.name: Merge PDFs
features.description: Combine 2-20 PDFs into one file

features.name: Split PDFs
features.description: Split by pages, halves, or custom ranges

features.name: Compress PDFs
features.description: Reduce PDF file size

features.name: Convert to/from PDF
features.description: Word/Excel/Image conversions

features.name: Conditional Field Logic
